title: Festive Bhuna Egg Roll
description: A delicious and easy-to-make dish that combines the flavors of an egg roll with the spices of a bhuna sauce. Perfect for a quick breakfast or snack.
instructions: 1. Preheat a non-stick pan or griddle to medium heat.
2. Brush the pan with buttery and place the roll in it.
3. Crack the eggs into the pan and scramble them with the roll.
4. Add the bhuna sauce and mix well.
5. Cook for 2-3 minutes or until the eggs are cooked through.
6. Add festival spices to taste and mix well.
8. Optional: Serve with toast or hash browns for a filling breakfast.
